rationale.R1.2: The artifact contains cascading hedges and conditional dependencies (heuristically tuned threshold, multi-task trade-off instability across language pairs) whose internal logical coherence needs checking regardless of review focus.
rationale.R1.3: Specific quantitative gains (4.2 COMET, 2.8 chrF on a lexically-ambiguous subset) and a load-bearing 'first' contribution claim exist alongside methodological details (1.8M sentences, 240k synthetic turns, 5k annotator sample) that must be checked for alignment.
